name: Lighthouse World Map
aboutText: Lighthouse World Map marks the lighthouses of the world's coasts — working navigation lights, decommissioned towers turned museums, and lonely beacons on far headlands and reefs.

Each lighthouse is sourced from OpenStreetMap's `man_made=lighthouse` tag and kept current by mappers and lighthouse enthusiasts. Many sit on private or protected land, so check access before setting out to one.
